Bus Timings

F8 Bus Schedule Al Nahda, The Sheffeild Private School 1 to Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre

June 20, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai Bus F8 provides an essential connection between Al Nahda and Dubai Festival City, serving both residential and commercial areas. With its extensive network and reliable service, Bus F8 is a valuable component of Dubai’s public transportation system.

Route Name F8
Route Description Al Nahda, The Sheffeild Private School 1 - Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre
Total Distance Approximately 10-20 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 30-40 minutes
Operational Hours 04:30 to 00:43 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Bus F8 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus F8 operates with frequent service throughout the day. The following are the departure times for the route in each direction:

From Al Nahda, The Sheffield Private School 1 From Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre

Bus F8 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F8 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus F8 is AED 5. The bus provides a convenient and economical means of transportation across various districts of Dubai.

Bus Booking

For convenience, passengers can use the RTA’s official website or mobile app to check route information and schedules. The RTA app also helps in real-time tracking and provides updates on bus arrivals.

Bus Route

The Bus F8 route covers a diverse range of stops, facilitating access to numerous landmarks and facilities in Dubai:

  1. Al Nahda, The Sheffeild Private School 1

  2. Zuleikha Hospital

  3. Al Nahda, 19A Street

  4. Madina Supermarket

  5. 12th Street

  6. Canary Building

  7. Sahara Center

  8. Dubai Carmel School

  9. Al Qusais, Public Transport Depot

  10. MAN Motors

  11. Al Qusais Industrial Area

  12. Damascus Road, 4

  13. Damascus Road, 3

  14. Damascus Road, 2

  15. Damascus Road

16.

  1. Emarat Petrol Station Al Mawred

  2. DAFZA

  3. Emirates Engineering

  4. Al Twar Dialysis Center

  1. Emirates Metro

  2. Dubai Municipality Garage

  3. Mawakeb School

  4. Dubai Festival City, Marks & Spencer

  5. Dubai Festival City, IKEA

  6. Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre

Some other Dubai bus routes you can explore include the 22, which runs from Dubai Courts to Al Nahda 1, Terminus, and the F37, which travels from Mall of the Emirates Bus Station to Shami Tower and back.

Bus F8 Station Overview

Al Nahda, The Sheffield Private School 1

The Al Nahda, The Sheffield Private School 1 bus station is strategically located near The Sheffield Private School in the Al Nahda area. This station caters to students, parents, and staff of the school, providing essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas and real-time bus schedule updates.

The proximity to the school ensures that the station is a convenient stop for the school community, facilitating easy access to and from educational activities. The station’s facilities support efficient and comfortable transportation, making it a crucial part of the local transit network for the school population.

Intersecting at Damascus Road 3 Bus Stop

The Damascus Road 3 Bus Stop serves as a major intersection for multiple bus routes, including 17, 43, 13B, C26, F8, F81, and X28. This key transit point provides seamless connections between these diverse routes, offering passengers efficient travel options across different areas. The station’s central location and well-maintained facilities enhance the convenience and accessibility of public transportation in the region.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Dafza

This key location facilitates convenient transfers between these routes, offering passengers efficient travel options within the Dafza area and beyond. The stop is equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, ensuring a smooth and accessible transit experience for all travelers.

Al Nahda, Emirates College Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Nahda, Emirates College Bus Stop serves as a significant transit point where Routes X13, F08, and 24 intersect. This location provides convenient access for students, staff, and visitors to the Emirates College, offering easy connections to various parts of Dubai. The intersection of these routes ensures seamless travel and enhances the connectivity of the Al Nahda area with other key destinations.

Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre

Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre bus station is positioned adjacent to the Festival Centre, one of Dubai’s major retail and entertainment complexes. This station offers a range of amenities including sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and up-to-date schedule information.

Its strategic location provides easy access to the shopping, dining, and entertainment options available at the Festival Centre, making it a popular stop for shoppers and visitors. The station plays a key role in facilitating transportation to this vibrant commercial hub, enhancing the overall convenience and experience for those frequenting the area.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus F8 route includes several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai. Here are some highlights along the way:

  1. Sahara Centre: This is a major shopping mall located in Al Qusais. It features a wide range of shops, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

  2. Dubai Festival City: This large development includes several attractions:

-item

-item

-item

Dubai Festival City, Marks & Spencer: A popular British retail store offering clothing, food, and home goods.

  1. Emirates Metro: While not a tourist attraction in itself, the metro station is a key transport hub connecting to various parts of Dubai and providing access to many tourist spots.

  2. Zuleikha Hospital: Although primarily a medical facility, it’s a significant landmark in the Al Nahda area.

  3. Dubai Grand Hotel: This hotel is located on Damascus Road and can be a choice for accommodations for travelers exploring the city.

6.

These spots offer a mix of shopping, dining, and entertainment, making Bus F8 a convenient route for exploring these popular locations.

Journey Experience

Festival City is also home to the stunning Imagine light and water show, adding an extra touch of excitement to the trip. Despite its length, the F8 route offers a diverse glimpse into Dubai’s dynamic neighborhoods, ending at one of the city’s top leisure spots.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Dubai Festival City, Festival Centre, the furthest point on the F8 bus route starting from Al Nahda, The Sheffield Private School 1, with a price range of AED 51-62. This destination is a prominent shopping and entertainment hub in Dubai, offering a variety of retail outlets, dining options, and leisure activities. Using Careem for this journey provides a convenient and efficient way to reach this vibrant location while enjoying the flexibility and comfort of a private ride.

In conclusion, Bus F8 is a critical component of Dubai’s public transport network, connecting significant locations and offering frequent service throughout the day. Its affordable fare and extensive route make it a practical choice for navigating the city efficiently. Whether you are heading to shopping destinations or key landmarks, Bus F8 ensures reliable access and convenience. The bus route’s comprehensive coverage and consistent schedules support both daily commutes and leisure travel across Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 20, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
